title: 有馬記念の後に・ジューショー？

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Spe and Grass are so tough to beat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to Special Week and Grass Wonder,
many other high-profile racers participated in this
year's Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing that Haru Urara was even able to
enter!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I did! Usually that's enough, but...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hm... I'm not sure, but I feel... strange.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I did my best and had fun, but... Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems confused by her emotions. She's truly
at a loss for words.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, her desire to run has been fueling
her, but other than that, nothing drives her to
race. This may be my chance to give her a clear
and fixed goal!
choice_data_list: I bet you'll figure it out if you try again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Try again? In the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That's it! Running always helps me think!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I wanna enter the Arima Kinen again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure her loss is what's eating Haru Urara up
inside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So I decide to train her for another year and have
her enter the Arima Kinen again with a refreshed
mindset.
choice_data_list: You'll need to win some graded races.
You'll need to win some graded races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In order for her to qualify for the Arima Kinen,
we'll have to improve her graded race results,
popularity, and running abilities.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Sooo... I have to get good grades and run hard?
choice_data_list: N-no, that's not what that means...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Heehee. I can't wait for next year's Arima
Kinen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I'll believe in Haru Urara's resolve. With this,
Haru Urara's classic year comes to an end.
